spec_match.rationale: The page now distinguishes removed HTML auto-detection from explicitly named encodings using a live TextDecoder label probe.

interactive.rationale: Preset text, Content-Type validation, meta checking, boundary cases, and the decoder probe all update live page output.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept still matches the feature index promise: validate Content-Type and meta charset behavior for Chrome 139.

edge_cases.rationale: The boundary matrix covers missing charset, explicit UTF-8, explicit ISO-2022-JP, header/meta conflicts, and non-HTML MIME cases.

design_system.rationale: The new case controls and panels use shared design variables with explicit text colors for local button backgrounds.

summary: Content-Type Validator now shows the Chrome 138 versus Chrome 139 charset-sniffing branches, exercises explicit decoder labels, and cites the correct ChromeStatus entry.
